paper.title: Mechanical and bond properties of coconut shell concrete
paper.authors: K. Gunasekaran; P.S. Kumar; M. Lakshmipathy

evidence.evidence_text: OPC 53 Grade, river sand, potable water, and coconut shell aggregate were used for concrete mixes.
Properties of selected trial mixes at 28-days: cement content, water-cement ratio, mix ratio and compressive strength.
Wood-cement ratio table at 28-days gives water-cement ratio, mix ratio and compressive strength for CS1-CS9.
Compressive strength of 100 mm cubes was measured according to IS 516:1959.
